introSection: El Vigía is a steel roller coaster located at Parque de la Costa in Tigre, Buenos Aires, Argentina.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: A train with 20 cars. Passengers are placed in a row of 2, for a total of 40 passengers per train.

fullText:
El Vigía is a steel roller coaster located at Parque de la Costa in Tigre, Buenos Aires, Argentina.

A train with 20 cars. Passengers are placed in a row of 2, for a total of 40 passengers per train.
